The '''''Pure Sabacc''''' was [[Starship/Legends|starship]] that belonged to [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Bortrek]] when he, for a short time, had stolen [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]''
